title: Occupational Health and Safety
content:
Occupational Health and Safety

About the Department of Occupational Health and Safety

Uskudar University Occupational Health and Safety Undergraduate Department

Uskudar University Occupational Health and Safety Undergraduate Department is a pioneering and innovative education programme that aims to train experts who will contribute to the creation of safe and healthy working environments in the business world. Our department offers a comprehensive and multidisciplinary curriculum in order to respond to the dynamic labour force needs of our country and provides students with an education that blends theoretical knowledge with practical skills.

Education and Academic Staff

In our department, the courses given by expert academicians and industry professionals provide students with theoretical knowledge as well as practical application skills. Our curriculum covers basic and advanced topics such as occupational health and safety management, risk analysis, ergonomics, labour law, fire safety, environmental health.

Equipped Training Laboratories

The Occupational Health and Safety Training Laboratory on Uskudar University campus is equipped with modern equipment where our students can put what they have learnt into practice. In these laboratories, practical trainings such as fire drills, first aid applications, risk assessment and occupational safety audits are carried out. In addition, thanks to our working at height training area, our students are prepared for the situations they may encounter in real work environments.

Practical Training and Internship Opportunities

Our department offers its students various internship and practice opportunities to reinforce their theoretical knowledge. Internship programmes carried out in cooperation with workplaces enable our students to gain sectoral experience and expand their professional networks. In addition, Erasmus+ opportunities can be used to participate in internship or education programmes abroad. In addition, thanks to our close relations with the sector, we aim to ensure that our graduates have an advantage in finding a job.

Career Opportunities

Graduates of Uskudar University Department of Occupational Health and Safety have a wide range of job opportunities such as public institutions, private sector companies, construction companies, health institutions and consultancy firms. Our graduates can direct their careers in various positions such as occupational safety specialist, risk management consultant, ergonomist, environmental health specialist. In addition, they have the opportunity to continuously improve themselves through further education and certificate programmes.

Social and Environmental Responsibility

As Uskudar University, we act with the awareness of sustainability and social responsibility. Our Undergraduate Department of Occupational Health and Safety aims to educate its students as individuals who prioritise safety and health not only in the workplace but also in society. In this context, we aim to increase the awareness of our students through various social projects and environment-oriented studies.

Conclusion

Uskudar University Occupational Health and Safety Undergraduate Department trains qualified and well-equipped professionals in the field of occupational health and safety with its strong academic staff, modern educational infrastructure and comprehensive education programme. If you want to take firm steps towards your future and make a difference in the business world, you can choose our Undergraduate Department of Occupational Health and Safety.
